summary.lv: PionPay (fintech ar meitas uzņēmumiem Igaunijā, AK un Latvijā) meklē IT Support speciālistu, kas sniegs IT atbalstu maksājumu pakalpojumu platformai.
summary.en: PionPay (a fintech with subsidiaries in Estonia, the UK and Latvia) is hiring an IT Support Specialist to support its payment-services platform.
